Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and line two baking sheets with parchment paper. Cream 1 cup (225g) softened unsalted butter with 3/4 cup granulated sugar and 3/4 cup packed brown sugar until light and fluffy, then beat in two large eggs and 2 teaspoons of vanilla extract. Whisk together 2 1/4 cups all-purpose flour, 1 teaspoon baking soda, and 1 teaspoon salt, then fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture along with 2 cups semi-sweet chocolate chips. Drop rounded tablespoons onto prepared baking sheets and bake for 9–11 minutes until edges are golden but centers still look slightly underdone.
